part.text:
# Preserving your work

Save a copy of files you create during this task to `/logs/artifacts/`. This directory is preserved after the run so outputs can be inspected. Organize with subdirectories if helpful (e.g., `/logs/artifacts/code/`, `/logs/artifacts/reports/`). The directory already exists and is writable.

***

A broken workflow at `/home/user/windmill-project/f/workflows/approval_notifier.ts` calls `waitForApproval()` but does NOT call `getResumeUrls()` before it and does NOT log/notify the approval URL. Fix the workflow by: (1) adding `getResumeUrls` and `step` to imports from `windmill-client`; (2) before the `waitForApproval()` call, adding `const urls = await step('approval_urls', () => getResumeUrls());` and `await step('log_approval_url', () => console.log(\`Approval required. Visit: ${urls.approvalPage}\`));`; (3) keeping `waitForApproval({ timeout: 7200 })\` unchanged; (4) keeping the rest of the workflow intact.

<system-reminder># System Information

Default Shell:

Current Time: Fri May 15 2026 01:42:45 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time)

# GIT STATUS
Current branch: 
Main branch (you will usually use this for PRs): 

Recent commits:


# TODOs
No TODOs yet, if you are working on tasks that would benefit from a todo list please use the todoWrite tool to create one.</system-reminder>

# Preserving your work

Save a copy of files you create during this task to `/logs/artifacts/`. This directory is preserved after the run so outputs can be inspected. Organize with subdirectories if helpful (e.g., `/logs/artifacts/code/`, `/logs/artifacts/reports/`). The directory already exists and is writable.

***

A broken workflow at `/home/user/windmill-project/f/workflows/approval_notifier.ts` calls `waitForApproval()` but does NOT call `getResumeUrls()` before it and does NOT log/notify the approval URL. Fix the workflow by: (1) adding `getResumeUrls` and `step` to imports from `windmill-client`; (2) before the `waitForApproval()` call, adding `const urls = await step('approval_urls', () => getResumeUrls());` and `await step('log_approval_url', () => console.log(\`Approval required. Visit: ${urls.approvalPage}\`));`; (3) keeping `waitForApproval({ timeout: 7200 })\` unchanged; (4) keeping the rest of the workflow intact.
